Event: Paper Hustle
Event Date: 18/05/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: AM343
Paper Hustle Amulet

When taking damage, the amulet's wearer has a 35% chance to freeze the enemy unit that inflicted the damage, and all enemy units in a small radius around, for 4 sec. The frozen enemy units can't move or attack for the duration, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec. The targets also receive magic damage equal to 40% of their maximum health. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. The amulet's owner restores health equal to 90% of the damage dealt by the ability. The ability triggers at most once per 7 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Cooldown: 4 secs
